scene.description: A white logo on a transparent background, featuring stylized wings with a halo above them, framing a line-art taxi car, and the name 'BLAS RODRÍGUEZ' below in a decorative font. All elements are white, designed to be placed on dark backgrounds.

background.description: Transparent background (no background). Render on solid white for now.

elements.description: Stylized angel wings, rendered in a bold, calligraphic line style, flaring outwards to the left and right.
elements.details: Bold, expressive brushstroke-like shapes forming wings with clear feather-like divisions. All in pure white color.

elements.description: A simple oval shape representing a halo, positioned horizontally above and between the wings.
elements.details: A continuous white outline forming an oval.

elements.description: A line-art illustration of a taxi car, depicted from a front-three-quarter view.
elements.details: A detailed but thin-line drawing showing the car's body, windows, headlights, wheels, and a small taxi sign on the roof. The line weight is much finer than the wings. All lines in light white/grey color.
